question: Which state has most number of students?
sql: SELECT C.state, COUNT(S.StuID) AS student_count FROM Student S JOIN City C ON S.city_code = C.city_code GROUP BY C.state ORDER BY student_count DESC LIMIT 1;

back_translation.intent: 统计每个州的学生数量并找出最多的学生所在的州

semantic.reason: 原始问题未提及City表，而SQL反向翻译描述中包含City表，可能引入了不必要的关联或导致统计逻辑错误。此外，列引用应为Student表的state字段而非City表的C.state，且未明确JOIN条件导致数据关联不清晰。
